references.name: The New York Times
observedPatterns: Strong serif typography hierarchy on dark sections
Kicker + headline + standfirst pattern for article headers
Thin decorative rules between content sections
adaptedElements: Editorial kicker/headline/standfirst hero layout for each view
Serif headings with sans-serif UI elements
Thin gradient accent rules as section dividers

references.name: Bloomberg
observedPatterns: Dark mode with high-contrast data visualization
Card-based content layout with subtle borders
Clean sans-serif UI paired with editorial content
adaptedElements: Dark surface cards with subtle border hover states
Steel blue accent color for data charts and interactive elements
Outfit sans-serif for UI controls against Libre Baskerville editorial content

references.name: Pentagram
adaptedElements: Full-bleed hero sections with gradient overlays on each view
Generous spacing with editorial rhythm between content blocks
Anime.js choreographed stagger animations on view transitions
